title: Theres something about Misato I cant stand
display_title: Theres something about Misato I cant stand
wikitext:
[]: There's something about Misato I can't stand...             Quote Post by Titus » Sun Aug 14, 2005 4:11 pm So, just for the sake of seeing how long this thread is gonna last and some1 wanted to see who'll do it, I stepped up 2 the challenge... Mwuhaha So, I don't like big breasts...... It's kinda hard to find something about Misato that I don't like, she is just such a cool chick! I mean, who wouldn't wana wake up 2 a (semi gorgious?) half naked chick and have her pass u a bear for breakfast? But hey. So like I said, I don't like big boobs. Shes also too old for my liking and her whole i'm this mean ass chick out for revenge thing, yeah, kinda blows.... Any thoughts people?

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Sun Aug 14, 2005 6:00 pm Gainax presents: a brand new comedy, from the man who brought you Evangelion.... There's something about Misato

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sun Aug 14, 2005 6:45 pm Space Penis wrote: Gainax presents: a brand new comedy, from the man who brought you Evangelion.... There's something about Misato

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Sun Aug 14, 2005 6:49 pm The first time I watched the series, Misato's sudden angstfest near the end annoyed the hell outta me, but then I watched some of the earlier episodes again and then everything clicked together. Really, Misato and Kaji are my two favourite characters. They both manage to be serious when it's needed and add humour when it's needed. . :idea:

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Sun Aug 14, 2005 7:04 pm Misato's alright, just a bit fucked up from her childhood. Can really say anymore becasue I am in a rush, cya later.

[]:             Quote Post by Iblis 19th Angel » Sun Aug 14, 2005 9:16 pm Eh, Misato's generally much too cheerful for me. I like dark, moody girls better. Rei all the way, baby!

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sun Aug 14, 2005 9:39 pm Reis way to zombie like for my tasts thanks.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Mon Aug 15, 2005 12:20 am Misato's ok! "She is the most normal of the bunch!"

[]:             Quote Post by Titus » Mon Aug 15, 2005 4:08 am DatDude wrote: Reis way to zombie like for my tasts thanks.

[]:             Quote Post by Ryo » Mon Aug 15, 2005 5:31 am *sighs* What's with the Rei fanboy invasion lately? First FFNET and now this ... Well, I don't dislike Misato. Asuka will probably be like her when she grows up, anyway. Edit: 400 posts and five NERV fig leaves! Go me!

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Mon Aug 15, 2005 5:32 am Ryo wrote: Well, I don't dislike Misato. Asuka will probably be like her when she grows up, anyway.

[]: Re: There's something about Misato I can't stand...             Quote Post by Takumi Fujiwara » Mon Aug 15, 2005 6:08 am Titus wrote: So, I don't like big breasts...

[]:             Quote Post by Titus » Mon Aug 15, 2005 6:08 am I don't think the hottie will end up like the spent lil major. That's just my opinion, everybodies diff you know..

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Mon Aug 15, 2005 10:10 am well...Asuka would probably end up slightly different (seeing as she ends up alone with Shinji after 3I...) and Misato is NOT the most normal...the most normal character in the entire series? probably someone like hikari

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Mon Aug 15, 2005 10:50 am yep, sadsadshinji is right. Probably someone like Hikari, or also like Toji. Misato has something like an Epido's complex.....

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Aug 15, 2005 12:12 pm Hyper Shinchan wrote: yep, sadsadshinji is right. Probably someone like Hikari, or also like Toji. Misato has something like an Epido's complex.....

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Mon Aug 15, 2005 12:21 pm sadsadshinji wrote: and Misato is NOT the most normal...the most normal character in the entire series? probably someone like hikari

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Aug 15, 2005 12:27 pm the_seventh_child wrote: sadsadshinji wrote: and Misato is NOT the most normal...the most normal character in the entire series? probably someone like hikari

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Mon Aug 15, 2005 12:29 pm DatDude wrote: the_seventh_child wrote: sadsadshinji wrote: and Misato is NOT the most normal...the most normal character in the entire series? probably someone like hikari

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Mon Aug 15, 2005 3:14 pm Does Fuyutski count as a main character? He seems rather normal compared to the others
